call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Alice, thanks for taking my call. My name is John with Financial Solutions. I see you filled out a form online regarding our Signature Credit Card. Um, are you still interested? 
Alice: Yeah, I think so. I'm looking to consolidate some debt. 
Agent: Great! We can definitely help with that. We're pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 15.99%. It comes with rewards points and a low annual fee. 
Alice: 15.99%? That's… okay, I guess. What's the annual fee? 
Agent: It's $99 a year, but the rewards you'll earn will easily offset that. Plus, we have a balance transfer offer at 0% for the first six months. 
Alice: Oh, that's good. So, I could transfer my current credit card balance? 
Agent: Absolutely! We can transfer up to your credit limit.  Would you like me to go ahead and process the application? It only takes a few minutes. 
Alice: Sure, let's do it.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Williams? My name is Sarah from Financial Solutions. We're offering a pre-approved Personal Loan… 
Robert: Hold on a minute. Where did you get my number? I didn't ask for this. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $10,000 Personal Loan at 10.5%. 
Robert: I don't need a loan. I'm retired. I'm perfectly fine. 
Agent: But sir, this could help with unexpected expenses or home improvements… 
Robert: Look, I said no. I don't want a loan. And I don't appreciate you calling me out of the blue.  Don't call me again. *click*.

Agent: Hi Emily, this is David from Financial Solutions. I'm calling about our Signature Credit Card. I understand you were referred by a partner. 
Emily: Oh, yeah, my friend Sarah mentioned it. She said it had good rewards. 
Agent: That's right! We're pre-approving you for an $8,000 Signature Credit Card at 14.5%. It offers 2% cashback on all purchases and travel insurance. 
Emily: That sounds pretty good. What's the credit limit like? 
Agent: It starts at $8,000, and you can request increases after six months. We also have a 0% introductory APR for the first year. 
Emily: Hmm, okay. What about fees? 
Agent: There's a $75 annual fee, but the cashback rewards typically cover that. We can also waive it for the first year if you spend over $5,000. 
Emily: Okay, that's tempting. I do spend a lot.  Can I get a breakdown of the rewards program? 
Agent: Absolutely! Let me send you a link to our rewards portal…  So, are you ready to proceed with the application? 
Emily: Yeah, let's do it.  Just send me that link first.

Agent: Hi Michael, this is Lisa from Financial Solutions. I see you inquired about a Personal Loan on our website. 
Michael: Yeah, I'm looking to renovate my kitchen. 
Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. 
Michael: 12.5%? That sounds reasonable. What are the terms? 
Agent: We offer terms from 3 to 7 years. What's your preferred repayment period? 
Michael: Probably 5 years. 
Agent: Okay, that would be approximately $299 a month. There's an origination fee of 2% of the loan amount, so $300. 
Michael: An origination fee? That's… annoying. 
Agent: It covers the cost of processing the loan. However, we can sometimes waive it for qualified applicants. 
Michael: Hmm. What other fees are there? 
Agent: There's a late payment fee of $25 if you miss a payment. But we also offer automatic payment options to avoid that. 
Michael: Okay.  I need to think about it. Can you send me a detailed breakdown of all the fees and the repayment schedule? 
Agent: Absolutely! I'll email that to you right away.  Would you like me to hold the pre-approval for you for 24 hours? 
Michael: Yes, please. That would be great.

Agent: Hello, Jessica? This is Sarah from Financial Solutions. We're offering a pre-approved… 
Jessica: (Interrupting) You guys called me yesterday! I told you I wasn't interested! 
Agent: I apologize for the inconvenience, ma'am. We're offering a $3,000 Signature Credit Card at 18.99%… 
Jessica: 18.99?! Are you kidding me? That's highway robbery! I'm reporting you to the Do Not Call Registry! 
Agent: Ma'am, please… 
Jessica: No, just take my number off your list! *click*

Agent: Hi David, this is John from Financial Solutions. I'm calling regarding our Personal Loan program. I understand you were referred by our partner, ABC Investments. 
David: Yes, I was. I'm looking to consolidate some high-interest debt. 
Agent: Great! We can definitely help with that. We're pre-approving you for a $20,000 Personal Loan at 9.5%. 
David: That sounds good. I've been looking at a few options. What's your rate compared to, say, Bank of America? 
Agent: Bank of America's rates for similar loans are currently around 11.25%. We're significantly lower. Plus, we offer a faster approval process and no prepayment penalties. 
David: No prepayment penalties? That's good to know. What are the fees? 
Agent: There's a 1.5% origination fee, so $300 in your case. But that's it. No hidden fees. 
David: Okay. And what are the terms? 
Agent: We offer terms from 3 to 7 years. We can tailor the repayment schedule to your budget. 
David: Hmm. I think 5 years would work. 
Agent: Excellent. That would be approximately $377 a month. Are you ready to proceed with the application? 
David: Yes, let's do it. I'm impressed with the rate and the lack of prepayment penalties.

Agent: Hello, Mrs. Wilson? This is David from Financial Solutions. We're offering a pre-approved Personal Loan… 
Linda: (Slowly) Hello? What was that? 
Agent: I said, I'm David from Financial Solutions. We're offering a $5,000 Personal Loan at 16.5%. 
Linda: 16.5? Oh dear. What does that even mean? 
Agent: It's the interest rate, ma'am. The cost of borrowing the money. 
Linda: Interest… oh, I see. But I don't understand. I just need a little help with some medical bills. 
Agent: We can definitely help with that. The monthly payments would be around $110. 
Linda: $110? Oh, that's… a lot. I'm not sure I can afford that. Could you repeat the interest rate, please? 
Agent: 16.5%. 
Linda: Oh my. I think I need to talk to my daughter about this. Thank you, dear. But I don't think I'm ready to apply right now.

Agent: Hi Kevin, this is Lisa from Financial Solutions. I see you applied for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Kevin: Yeah, I need a card to build my credit. I'm trying to get a car. 
Agent: Perfect! We're pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at 17.5%. It's a great way to establish credit. 
Kevin: Okay, cool. What's the limit? 
Agent: $2,500. And you'll earn rewards points on every purchase. 
Kevin: Alright, sounds good. How fast can I get approved? I need this quickly. 
Agent: We can usually approve applications within 24 hours. 
Kevin: Awesome. Let's just do it. I don't have time to mess around. 
Agent: Great! I just need a few more details to confirm your application…

Agent: Hi Maria, this is Sarah from Financial Solutions. I'm calling regarding our Personal Loan program. I understand you were referred by our partner, Coastal Credit Union. 
Maria: Yes, that's right. I'm looking to consolidate some debt and potentially do some home improvements. 
Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We're pre-approving you for a $12,000 Personal Loan at 11.99%. 
Maria: That sounds very competitive. What are the terms? 
Agent: We offer terms from 3 to 7 years. What repayment period are you comfortable with? 
Maria: I think 6 years would be best. 
Agent: Okay, that would be approximately $222 a month. There's an origination fee of 1% of the loan amount, so $120. 
Maria: That's reasonable. Are there any other fees? 
Agent: Just a late payment fee of $25 if you miss a payment. We also offer automatic payment options to avoid that. 
Maria: Okay. And what about prepayment penalties? 
Agent: We don't have any prepayment penalties. You can pay off the loan early without any extra charges. 
Maria: That's great! I think I'm ready to proceed with the application. 
Agent: Wonderful! Let's get started. I just need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello, Mr. Thompson? This is David from Financial Solutions. We're offering a pre-approved Signature Credit Card… 
George: (Interrupting) I'm unemployed! I don't need a credit card! *click*
